description: Bevel Stripe Mesh is a component that generates Mesh data for cube with a different bevel depth on the top left edge and bottom right edge of the cube. It can also be indented in the middle on two opposite sides.

fields.SlantLeft: the Bevel angle of the length wise edge on the top left.
fields.SlantRight: the Bevel angle of the length wise edge on the bottom right.
fields.Relief: Whether to indent the cube in the center.

usage: The geometry this generates can be viewed by inserting the component into a Mesh Renderer component. Don't forget to use a material with the mesh renderer.
